deep_dive.title: XRZero-G0: Pushing the Frontier of Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with Interfaces, Quality and Ratios
deep_dive.abstract: The acquisition of high-quality, action-aligned demonstration data remains a fundamental bottleneck in scaling foundation models for dexterous robot manipulation. Although robot-free human demonstrations (e.g., the UMI paradigm) offer a scalable alternative to traditional teleoperation, current systems are constrained by sub-optimal hardware ergonomics, open-loop workflows, and a lack of systematic data-mixing strategies. To address these limitations, we present XRZero-G0, a hardware-software co-designed system for embodied data collection and policy learning. The system features an ergonomic, virtual reality interface equipped with a top-view camera and dual specialized grippers to directly improve collection efficiency. To ensure dataset reliability, we propose a closed-loop collection, inspection, training, and evaluation pipeline for non-proprioceptive data. This workflow achieves an 85% data validity rate and establishes a transparent mechanism for quality control. Furthermore, we investigate the empirical scaling behaviors and optimal mixing ratios of robot-free data. Extensive experiments indicate that combining a minimal volume of real-robot data with large-scale robot-free data (e.g., a 10:1 ratio) achieves performance comparable to exclusively real-robot datasets, while reducing acquisition costs by a factor of twenty. Utilizing XRZero-G0, we construct a 2,000-hour robot-free dataset that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer to a target physical robot, demonstrating a highly scalable methodology for generalized real-world manipulation.Our project repository: https://github.com/X-Square-Robot/XRZero-G0

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: XRZero-G0 is a VR-based system for efficient data collection and policy learning in dexterous manipulation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: XRZero-G0是一个基于虚拟现实的系统，旨在提高灵巧机器人操作的数据采集效率和策略学习效果。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: XRZero-G0是一个基于虚拟现实的系统，旨在提高灵巧机器人操作的数据采集效率和策略学习效果。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 查询使用第一视角数据训练灵巧操作的相关论文, especially work that connects or combines: research on using first-person visual or sensory data for dexterous manipulation learning; studies focusing on dexterous robotic or hand manipulation tasks; research on egocentric vision for robotic manipulation training; robotic manipulation research leveraging first-person datasets; benchmark datasets containing first-person recordings for manipulation learning; policy learning methods for dexterous manipulation using first-person observations; papers on training dexterous manipulation using first person or egocentric data; studies leveraging egocentric vision for robotic dexterous skill learning; research on imitation learning and representation learning methods for dexterous manipulation from first person data.
